/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libros2_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libros2_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/ros2_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/ros2_interface/srv/detail/ex_custom_srv__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
